story.text:
# 🚪 mymage (Mage · Spellbook Projection)
**gateway** · mage · knowledge

Chrome MV3 extension — the Mage agent operationalized (mages-spell · v1.0.0 · local). Proposer/scanner: deep page analysis (trackers · cookies · forms · dark patterns · policy), six-dimension hexagram synthesis onto the lattice, SD-BASE variant + spell-constellation proposals sent over the ceremony channel. Does not modify the page or assert agreements — that is the Swordsman's side of the Gap.

## Edges in

- [[myterms (MyTerms Alliance kit)]] *requires* →
- [[mysword (Swordsman · Privacy Blade)]] *complement_pair* →
